title: Unsafe narrowing cast in concentrated liquidity AMM burn() silently truncates liquidity delta allowing attacker to steal pool tokens
Concentrated liquidity position manager burn() propagates incorrect token amounts from underlying pool causing LP to receive less than entitled
Concentrated liquidity pool initialization missing sqrtPrice bounds check causes permanent denial-of-service via TickMath revert
Fee growth inside range calculation uses wrong tick boundary reference producing incorrect fee deltas for in-range liquidity providers
